description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
Release Highlight
- Reading: Added single section scroll option, keyboard shortcuts help dialog, and reading ruler improvements
- Reading: Fixed Adobe font deobfuscation and applied theme colors to PDFs
- Reading: Fixed paginator freeze, image sizing on resize, and vertical writing mode compatibility
- Annotations: Fixed annotations grouped under wrong chapter and added highlight opacity setting
- Text-to-Speech: Added dedicated TTS settings tab with highlight opacity and keyboard shortcuts for navigation
- Sync: Added Hardcover.app sync integration and improved KOSync progress accuracy
- KOReader Plugin: Added full annotation sync option and fixed sync-related crashes
- OPDS: Added custom catalog headers with web proxy consent and fixed feed display issues
- Speed Reading: Added per-chapter progress bar and speed selector dropdown
- Android: Added D-pad navigation for Android TV remote controller
- Theme: Added atmosphere Easter egg with video overlay and ambient audio
What's Changed
- fix(release): skip architecture check for 32-bit ARM by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3589
- chore(release): disable linux-arm build for now as turso can't work on it for now by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3590
- chore(release): generate changelog from release notes for google play by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3591
- fix(koplugin): fixed koreader crash on logout, closes #3598 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3603
- fix(pdf): apply theme colors for PDFs, closes #3593 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3626
- fix(library): mixed sorting for group and ungroupped books, closes #3596 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3627
- compat(android): disable native long-click on the WebView to prevent the system image context menu, closes #3629 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3630
- chore(deps): bump android-actions/setup-android from 3 to 4 in the github-actions group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3631
- fix(koplugin): prevent resurrecting deleted highlights and duplicate overlays on notes pull by @leekaize in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3639
- chore: bump next.js, opennextjs and wrangler to the latest versions by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3642
- fix: show proper background images in continuous scrolled mode, closes #3638 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3645
- fix(android): never try to fight with the navigation bar on Android ever, closes #3618 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3646
- chore: bump turso to the latest version by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3650
- feat(tts): add shortcuts to navigate and play/pause in TTS mode, closes #3620 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3651
- feat: add keyboard shortcuts help dialog by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3653
- fix(eink): disable range editor loupe for annotations on Eink devices, closes #3655 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3656
- fix(opds): fixed image download from ODPS server on the web, closes #3649 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3658
- feat(android): add foss flavor build without gms services by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3666
- feat(scroll): add single section scroll option, closes #3663 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3668
- chore(release): exclude turso wasm in app builds by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3674
- chore(fdroid): get rid of wasm binaries in fdroid build by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3677
- chore(fdroid): build qcms wasm for fdroid by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3680
- css: add css selector for status badge, closes #3678 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3684
- layout: don't truncate remaining progress info without status info, closes #3678 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3685
- fix(layout): fixed infinite expand calls and freeze in the paginator, closes #3683 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3690
- fix(layout): fixed infinite expand calls and freeze in the paginator, closes #3683 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3692
- fix(shortcuts): change bookmark shortcut from Ctrl+D to Ctrl+B by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3691
- chore(deps): bump vulnerable dependencies to address Dependabot alerts by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3693
- chore: migrate from ESLint to Biome for linting by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3694
- fix(fonts): fix Adobe font deobfuscation and CSS var fallbacks by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3696
- i18n: update translations for aria label by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3697
- fix(layout): fix primary view detection on fractional DPR devices, closes #3681 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3701
- fix(iOS): use correct system theme mode in auto mode on iOS, closes #3698 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3704
- fix(opds): fix Copyparty books showing as "Untitled" in mixed feeds, closes #3667 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3705
- fix(annotations): fix all annotations grouped under last chapter for fragment-href TOCs by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3706
- feat(settings): add TTS settings tab and highlight opacity, closes #3661 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3712
- chore(test): add unit tests and enforce dash-case naming for test files by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3715
- feat(i18n): add Romanian (ro) translation by @teodorcosma in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3708
- chore(bump): bump Tauri to the latest version by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3716
- fix(library): always sort series books by index ascending, closes #3709 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3717
- feat(sync): add full sync option for annotations in koplugin by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3718
- fix(storage): paginate stats query and align file size formatting by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3720
- chore(agent): update agent skills and memories by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3721
- feat: make reading ruler selection and step navigation coherent by @WhiteHades in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3722
- feat(rsvp): progress bar per chapter, speed selector dropdown, and UX improvements by @lexm2 in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3723
- feat(theme): add atmosphere easter egg with video overlay and ambient audio by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3727
- fix(android): auto-shutdown native TTS engine after idle to save battery by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3728
- fix(layout): fixed static image size and layout shift on window resize, closes #3634 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3729
- fix: preserve paragraph mode reading layouts and other UI/UX fixes by @WhiteHades in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3730
- feat: Hardcover.app Sync by @AnandakrishnanV in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3724
- fix(kosync): don't normalize xpointer for more accurate progress sync, closes #3672 and closes #3616 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3733
- fix(paginator): fixed paginator section preloading, closes #3600 and closes #3601 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3734
- fix: fixed status info layout in vertical mode, fixed Android build by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3735
- feat(opds): support custom catalog headers with web proxy consent by @ShunnyBunny in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3740
- compat(vertical): check writing mode also for child element of body, closes #3583 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3743
- fix(android): get rid of the outline on the header and footer bar when using remote control to turn page by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3744
- feat(android): add D-pad navigation for Android TV remote controller by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3745
- fix(android): use mobile footer bar in portrait mode, closes #3742 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3746
- fix(tts): avoid race condition in preloadNextSSML causing wrong highlights by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3748
- fix(layout): fixed layout of progress bar in vertical mode by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3749
- release: version 0.10.2 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/3750
